raw_text:
Luminova Technologies // Manager, Frontend Engineering

San Francisco, CA (Hybrid) | Full-time | $210,000 - $270,000 per year

Empowering businesses with intelligent, accessible digital experiences

>> ABOUT

Luminova Technologies is a San Francisco-based SaaS company specializing in customer data
platforms and personalization engines for mid-market enterprises. Founded in 2018, we serve

over 500 customers across retail, fintech, and healthcare sectors. Our engineering culture
emphasizes ownership, continuous learning, and building products that prioritize both

performance and accessibility.

>> SUMMARY

Luminova Technologies is hiring a Manager of Frontend Engineering to lead and mentor a team

of 5-7 frontend engineers while driving the technical vision for our core web platform.
You'll combine hands-on technical expertise with people leadership, ensuring your team

delivers high-performance, accessible user interfaces that power our CDP platform. This
role reports to the VP of Engineering and sits at the intersection of product strategy,

technical execution, and team development.

>> RESPONSIBILITIES

- Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 5-7 frontend engineers through 1-on-1s, code

reviews, career planning, and technical growth opportunities
- Architect and oversee the evolution of our React/TypeScript frontend stack, making

decisions on framework upgrades (Next.js adoption), build tooling (Webpack/Vite), and
performance optimization strategies

- Collaborate with Product and Design to translate requirements into technical roadmaps;
define sprint goals and ensure on-time delivery of features for our personalization

engine UI
- Drive accessibility compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA) across the platform and establish best

practices for semantic HTML, ARIA implementation, and keyboard navigation
- Implement and champion web performance standards, including Core Web Vitals

optimization, code splitting strategies with Next.js, and monitoring via real-world
metrics

- Participate in architectural discussions for cross-team initiatives; represent frontend
interests in backend/infra decisions affecting client-facing experiences

- Conduct technical interviews for frontend hiring and build a diverse, high-performing
engineering team

- Own frontend CI/CD pipeline improvements, TypeScript configuration, and Tailwind/CSS
standardization across the team

- Set and communicate quarterly objectives (OKRs) for the frontend team; track progress
and adapt priorities based on business impact

>> MUST HAVE

- 6+ years of frontend software engineering experience, with at least 2 years in a team
lead or management role

 - Expert-level proficiency in React and TypeScript; demonstrated ability to mentor others

on modern JavaScript patterns and type safety
- Strong understanding of web performance, accessibility standards (WCAG), and responsive

design principles
- Hands-on experience with Next.js or similar meta-frameworks; familiarity with build

tools (Webpack, Vite, or equivalent)
- Proven track record of shipping production features end-to-end; experience scaling

frontend systems as product complexity grows
- Excellent communication skills; ability to present technical decisions to non-technical

stakeholders and coach engineers at varying levels

>> NICE TO HAVE

- Experience migrating a large codebase from class components or older patterns to modern

React hooks and TypeScript
- Familiarity with Tailwind CSS or other utility-first CSS frameworks and component

library design
- Background in developer experience (DX) improvements, build system optimization, or

monorepo tooling
- Experience with analytics instrumentation and web performance monitoring (e.g., Sentry,

DataDog, Google Analytics)
- Involvement in open-source projects or technical blogging demonstrating thought

leadership in frontend

>> STACK

React / TypeScript / Next.js / Tailwind CSS / Webpack / Vite / Web Accessibility (WCAG, ARIA) / Web

Performance Optimization (Core Web Vitals) / CSS Modules / Testing Libraries (Jest, React Testing
Library)

>> BENEFITS

- Competitive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) with employer-subsidized

premiums
- 401(k) matching up to 4% of salary

- Unlimited PTO and 10 company holidays
- Professional development budget ($2,500/year) for courses, conferences, and

certifications
- Remote flexibility: work from home up to 3 days/week; relocation support for candidates

- Equity (stock options) vesting over 4 years with a 1-year cliff
- Paid parental leave (12 weeks) and fertility benefits

- Team events and company offsites twice annually

>> APPLY

Apply via our careers page at luminova.careers with your resume, a cover letter

highlighting your team leadership experience, and a link to your GitHub profile or
portfolio. Selected candidates will participate in a phone screen with our VP of

Engineering, followed by a technical assessment and team interview rounds. We aim to
complete our hiring process within 2-3 weeks.
